2014May 4, 2014

🇺🇸 Philadelphia, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Philadelphia, United States, May 4, 2014 -- May 9, 2014

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2014-05-philadelphia-usa

19 Resolutions

881Plenary
Thank Dr. Gerry Radack for his service and dedication
SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks to Dr. Gerry Radack for his exceptional dedication and outstanding service for many years in the international standardization community. SC 4 espe...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
880Plenary
Send liaison statement to IEC TC 171/SC 2 on ISO/CD 17911
SC 4 requests its secretariat to send the above liaison statement to the secretariat of ISO/TC 171/SC 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
879Plenary
Investigate possible scope overlaps with IEC SC 65E
SC 4 requests its liaison officers Messrs Murayama and Ondracek to contact IEC SC 65E and investigate possible areas of overlaps, which could be the subject of future cooperation between SC 4 and I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
878Plenary
Participate in the TC 184/TC 65 ad hoc group
SC 4 requests its WG 2 to participate in the proposed TC 184/TC 65 ad hoc group by showing and describing the practical uses of the standards ISO 13584 and ISO 22745 which shows the benefit in a pr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
877Plenary
Direct project group on ISO 14306 ed2 to continue work
SC 4 directs the project group on ISO 14306 ed2 "JT" to continue its work under the following conditions: * The platform for document storage and providing information in written electronic form is...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
876Plenary
Send liaison statement to IEC/TC 3 regarding scope overlap
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to send a liaison statement to IEC/TC 3 before 2014-06-06 highlighting the potential overlap of scope, and to request the TC 184 Secretariat to re-establish a liaison ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
875Plenary
Invite experts to the MOU/MG Semantic Interoperability project
SC 4 invites David Leal, Anne-Francoise Cutting-Decelle and Keith Hunten to participate in the MOU/MG Semantic Interoperability project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
874Plenary
Establish 2-month ballot duration for NPs 15926-12 and 10303-242e2
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 2-month duration to NPs for 15926-12 and 10303-242e2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
873Plenary
Cancel PAS 26183
SC 4 agrees to cancel Publicly Available Specification 26183 "Product Data Quality Guidelines for the Global Automotive Industry".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
872Plenary
Welcome Jay Hollingsworth as liaison from Energistics
SC 4 welcomes Jay Hollingsworth as liaison from Energistics, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
871Plenary
Appoint Tor Arne Irgens as liaison to ISO/TC 176 for ISO 9000
SC 4 appoints Tor Arne Irgens as liaison to ISO/TC 176 for ISO 9000, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
870Plenary
Appoint Nicolas Figay as liaison to OSLC
SC 4 appoints Nicolas Figay as liaison to OSLC, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
869Plenary
Issue call for nominations for WG 23 Vocabulary Validation Team Leader
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to circulate a call for nominations for the post of WG 23 Vocabulary Validation Team Leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
868Plenary
Appoint Nils Sandsmark as WG 3 Deputy Convener
SC 4 appoints Nils Sandsmark as Deputy Convener for WG 3 for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
867Plenary
Reappoint David Loffredo as WG 11 Convener
SC 4 appoints David Loffredo as Convener for WG 11 for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
866Plenary
Issue call for nominations for Quality Committee Convener
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to circulate a call for nominations for the post of Quality Committee Convener for a three-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to ECCMA for their hosting and support of the 67th ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at ACE Conference Center, Philadelphia, PA. We especially commend them for an exc...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
